====Definitions====
{{head|zh|hanzi}}

# to [[lose]]; to [[lose]] [[track]] of
# to [[omit]]; to [[leave out]]
# to [[abandon]]; to [[forgo]]; to [[abolish]]; to [[annul]]
# to [[forget]]; to [[fail]] to [[remember]]
# to [[lack]]; to be [[short]] of
# to [[leave]] behind; to [[leave]] over; to [[hand down]]
# to [[bequeath]]; to [[leave]] behind at one's [[death]]; to [[leave]] in [[will]]
# [[left]] by the [[deceased]]
# to [[emit]]; to [[discharge]] (involuntarily)
# something [[lost]]; lost [[article]]s; lost [[property]]

===Etymology 1===
{{ja-kanjitab|い|yomi=kanon}}
{{IPAchar|/wi/}} → {{IPAchar|/i/}}

From {{der|ja|ltc|sort=い|-}} {{ltc-l|遺|id=1}}.

The ''[[漢音#Japanese|kan'on]]'' pronunciation, so likely a later borrowing.

====Pronunciation====
{{ja-pron|い}}

====Noun====
{{ja-noun|い|hhira=ゐ}}

# something [[fallen]], something [[lost]] or [[left behind]]

====Affix====
{{ja-pos|affix|い|hhira=ゐ}}

# be [[left]], [[remain]]
# [[leave behind]] after one's [[death]], [[bequeath]]
# [[leave behind]], [[forget]]
# [[give]], [[present]]
# [[let]] [[leak]]

===Etymology 2===
{{ja-kanjitab|ゆい|yomi=goon}}
From {{der|ja|ltc|sort=ゆい|-}} {{ltc-l|遺|id=1}}.

The ''[[呉音#Japanese|goon]]'' pronunciation, so likely the initial borrowing.

====Pronunciation====
{{ja-pron|ゆい}}

====Affix====

# [[leave behind]] after [[death]]

=====Usage notes=====
